arts.ttl: ‘We do now know…’: Sky Sports shares England injury update that will worry Arsenal fans
arts.sum: Arsenal attacker Bukayo Saka picked up a hamstring injury while on international duty with England earlier this week against Greece. The player will now miss the upcoming international game against Finland and he has returned to his club to determine the true extent of the damage. Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta lost Martin Odegaard to a […] The post ‘We do now know…’: Sky Sports shares England injury update that will worry Arsenal fans appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Saka leaves England squad amid injury concerns
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has returned to Arsenal for further assessment on the injury he picked in England's loss to Greece on Thursday, the national side confirmed on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella takes bizarre dig at Cole Palmer and reveals his Chelsea team-mate's one flaw
arts.sum: Chelsea star Marc Cucrella took a cheeky swipe at superstar teammate Cole Palmer over his appearance but believes England international is destined to 'be among the best'.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish says Tottenham have a player he prefers to Franck Ribery
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has been ranking and rating some of the best wingers in football history. The England international has been speaking to TalkSPORT on TikTok...

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s Bukayo Saka injury worries mount after England update for Finland game
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka picked up an apparent hamstring injury during England's 2-1 defeat by Greece on Thursday and has now left the squad to return to Arsenal for further assessment

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka ruled out of England’s match against Finland
arts.sum: The winger limped off during the loss to Greece.

arts.ttl: Saka leaves England camp for further assessment on injury
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has left the England training camp and returned to Arsenal for further assessment on the injury he picked up against Greece.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka withdraws from the England squad after picking up injury in Greece defeat - as Liverpool star also drops out of Finland clash
arts.sum: Saka was forced off injured in this international break's opening tie against Greece at Wembley on Thursday evening, ramping up concerns from national team and Arsenal fans alike.

arts.ttl: England star sends touching tribute to George Baldock after match-winning performance
arts.sum: James McAtee scored two late goals to earn England under-21s a 2-1 win over Ukraine on Friday night - and he dedicated them both to his former Sheffield United team-mate George Baldock

arts.ttl: The FA should remember Gareth Southgate setback before making Lee Carsley judgement
arts.sum: Wembley embarrassment should not be a decisive blow to interim manager Lee Carsley's long-term prospects,,, as long as England shine against Finland in Helsinki
